goal: Master core DSA through JavaScript game development, then transition to AtCoder competitive programming

weeks.concepts: Array manipulation, queue operations (enqueue/dequeue), collision detection, coordinate systems
weeks.key_learning: Queues naturally model sequential data like a snake's body segments

weekend_breakdown.saturday: Build grid system, snake movement, food spawning
weekend_breakdown.sunday: Implement queue-based body growth, collision detection, game loop

weeks.concepts: 2D array representation, win condition checking (row/col/diag traversal), turn management
weeks.key_learning: Matrix operations and pattern matching in 2D space

weekend_breakdown.saturday: Build 3x3 grid UI, player turn logic, click handlers
weekend_breakdown.sunday: Implement win-check algorithms for all 8 winning lines, draw detection

weeks.concepts: Hash map for O(1) card state lookup, Set for tracking matched pairs, shuffling algorithm (Fisher-Yates)
weeks.key_learning: Hash structures provide instant state checking without linear search

weekend_breakdown.saturday: Create card deck, shuffle logic, flip animation, pair matching
weekend_breakdown.sunday: Implement timer, move counter, hash-based state management, win condition

weeks.concepts: Array of brick objects, boundary collision, vector reflection, AABB collision detection
weeks.key_learning: Arrays store game objects; physics requires understanding vectors and bounds

weekend_breakdown.saturday: Build paddle, ball physics, wall collisions
weekend_breakdown.sunday: Implement brick array, brick-ball collision, level progression, score system

weeks.concepts: Stack operations (push/pop/peek), recursive solution, base case & recursive case, call stack visualization
weeks.key_learning: Recursion elegantly solves problems with optimal substructure; stacks model the physical towers

weekend_breakdown.saturday: Build 3 pegs as stacks, disk rendering, drag-and-drop or click-to-move
weekend_breakdown.sunday: Implement recursive solver with animation, step counter, validate moves

weeks.concepts: Singly linked list for note sequence, traversal, insertion, deletion, timing synchronization
weeks.key_learning: Linked lists excel at sequential data with frequent insertions/deletions without shifting

weekend_breakdown.saturday: Build note lane UI, linked list note structure, beat mapping
weekend_breakdown.sunday: Implement note spawning, hit detection, combo system, scoring based on timing accuracy

weeks.concepts: Two stacks for undo/redo, command pattern, deep copy for state preservation, LIFO principle
weeks.key_learning: Dual stacks enable infinite undo/redo — a classic application of LIFO data structures

weekend_breakdown.saturday: Build canvas, color picker, brush tools, stack-based action history
weekend_breakdown.sunday: Implement undo/redo with dual stacks, export to image, fill bucket (BFS preview)

weeks.concepts: FIFO queue for customer line, queue for order processing, patience timer, dequeue operations
weeks.key_learning: Real-world service systems are queue-based; FIFO ensures fairness in processing

weekend_breakdown.saturday: Build customer queue system, table assignment, order taking
weekend_breakdown.sunday: Implement cooking queue, serving queue, customer patience meter, revenue tracking

weeks.concepts: String manipulation, hash map for letter frequency, set for guessed letters, string comparison
weeks.key_learning: Hash maps enable O(1) lookup for letter existence and frequency counting

weekend_breakdown.saturday: Build word bank, hidden word display, letter input, hangman drawing
weekend_breakdown.sunday: Implement frequency analysis hint system, difficulty levels, word categories, streak tracker

weeks.concepts: Trie for dictionary storage, DFS for grid traversal, prefix pruning, backtracking on grid
weeks.key_learning: Tries enable efficient prefix-based word validation; DFS explores all paths in a grid

weekend_breakdown.saturday: Build 4x4 letter grid, Trie dictionary loader, word input validation
weekend_breakdown.sunday: Implement DFS word finder with Trie pruning, timer, score by word length, highlight found paths

weeks.concepts: Binary tree construction, inorder/preorder/postorder traversal, level-order (BFS), tree height
weeks.key_learning: Different traversals reveal different relationships; trees model hierarchical data naturally

weekend_breakdown.saturday: Build tree node structure, family member creation, tree rendering
weekend_breakdown.sunday: Implement all 4 traversals, find ancestor/descendant, LCA finder, tree depth calculator

weeks.concepts: BST insertion, search, deletion, tree balancing intuition, inorder traversal for sorted order
weeks.key_learning: BST properties enable O(log n) operations; inorder traversal yields sorted sequence

weekend_breakdown.saturday: Build BST from random numbers, visual tree rendering, search animation
weekend_breakdown.sunday: Implement insert/delete with animations, find min/max, kth smallest element game mode

weeks.concepts: Grid as implicit graph, BFS for empty cell revelation, adjacency counting, flood fill algorithm
weeks.key_learning: BFS efficiently reveals connected safe zones; grids are graphs in disguise

weekend_breakdown.saturday: Build grid, mine placement, neighbor mine counting, click handlers
weekend_breakdown.sunday: Implement BFS flood fill for zero-adjacent cells, flag system, win/lose detection, timer

weeks.concepts: Maze as graph, BFS for ghost pathfinding, DFS for maze exploration, state machines for ghost AI
weeks.key_learning: Graph traversal powers AI decision-making; BFS finds shortest paths for chasing behavior

weekend_breakdown.saturday: Build maze graph, Pac-Man movement, dot collection, power pellets
weekend_breakdown.sunday: Implement BFS ghost AI, ghost states (chase/scatter/frightened), score system, lives

weeks.concepts: Min-heap/max-heap, priority queue operations, heapify, extract-min, decrease-key
weeks.key_learning: Heaps guarantee O(log n) access to highest-priority element — critical for real-time systems

weekend_breakdown.saturday: Build patient generator, priority scoring (severity + wait time), heap structure
weekend_breakdown.sunday: Implement heap-based priority queue, treat patients in order, resource management, statistics

weeks.concepts: Bubble, Selection, Insertion, Merge, Quick, Heap sort; time complexity visualization, divide & conquer
weeks.key_learning: Understanding tradeoffs between O(n²) and O(n log n) sorts; divide & conquer paradigm

weekend_breakdown.saturday: Implement 6 sorting algorithms with step-by-step visualization bars
weekend_breakdown.sunday: Build race mode (algorithms compete), user prediction betting, complexity comparison chart

weeks.concepts: Backtracking algorithm, pruning invalid states, recursion tree, constraint satisfaction, board state representation
weeks.key_learning: Backtracking systematically explores possibilities while abandoning partial candidates that fail constraints

weekend_breakdown.saturday: Build NxN board, queen placement, attack validation (row/col/diag)
weekend_breakdown.sunday: Implement backtracking solver with animation, count all solutions, user solve mode with hints

weeks.concepts: Backtracking with forward checking, valid candidate generation, 3x3 subgrid validation, puzzle generation
weeks.key_learning: Constraint propagation reduces search space dramatically before backtracking begins

weekend_breakdown.saturday: Build 9x9 grid, input validation, puzzle loader, solver with backtracking
weekend_breakdown.sunday: Implement puzzle generator (reverse solver), difficulty levels, hint system, timer

weeks.concepts: Top-down memoization, bottom-up tabulation, optimal substructure, overlapping subproblems, Fibonacci pattern
weeks.key_learning: DP avoids recomputation by storing subproblem solutions; memoization vs tabulation tradeoffs

weekend_breakdown.saturday: Build stair-climbing game, recursive solution, add memoization cache
weekend_breakdown.sunday: Implement tabulation version, compare performance, add obstacles/variable steps, coin change variant

weeks.concepts: 2D DP table, 0/1 knapsack recurrence, space optimization, item selection reconstruction
weeks.key_learning: 2D DP tables capture state transitions; optimal substructure builds solutions from smaller knapsacks

weekend_breakdown.saturday: Build RPG inventory UI, item weight/value system, DP solver with table visualization
weekend_breakdown.sunday: Implement item reconstruction (which items picked), space-optimized 1D version, multiple test cases

weeks.concepts: Weighted graphs, relaxation, priority queue in Dijkstra, shortest path tree, path reconstruction
weeks.key_learning: Dijkstra's greedily selects the minimum distance node, guaranteeing shortest paths in positive-weight graphs

weekend_breakdown.saturday: Build city map as weighted graph, Dijkstra implementation with min-heap priority queue
weekend_breakdown.sunday: Add multiple delivery points, traffic weight updates, path animation, fuel cost optimization

weeks.concepts: Greedy choice property, Huffman tree construction, min-heap for merging, prefix codes, compression ratio
weeks.key_learning: Greedy algorithms make locally optimal choices that lead to globally optimal solutions in specific structures

weekend_breakdown.saturday: Build frequency counter, min-heap for Huffman tree construction, tree visualization
weekend_breakdown.sunday: Implement encoding/decoding, compression ratio calculator, interactive text compression game

weeks.concepts: DSU with path compression & union by rank, Kruskal's algorithm for maze generation, randomized edge weights
weeks.key_learning: DSU efficiently tracks connected components; Kruskal's MST generates perfect mazes

weekend_breakdown.saturday: Implement DSU data structure, Kruskal-based maze generation with wall carving
weekend_breakdown.sunday: Add multiple solving algorithms (DFS, BFS, wall-follower), maze complexity slider, solution reveal

weeks.concepts: Segment tree construction, range query, point update, lazy propagation intro, Fenwick tree for prefix sums
weeks.key_learning: Segment trees answer range queries in O(log n) after O(n) build — essential for competitive programming

weekend_breakdown.saturday: Build segment tree with array visualization, range sum queries, point updates
weekend_breakdown.sunday: Implement Fenwick tree variant, range max query mode, comparison with brute force, interactive challenges

weeks.concepts: Fast I/O patterns, problem classification, greedy/DP/graph recognition, contest simulation, time management
weeks.key_learning: Pattern recognition separates good competitive programmers from beginners; speed comes from repetition

weekend_breakdown.saturday: Solve 5 AtCoder ABC problems (A-E), implement fast input template, classify each by technique
weekend_breakdown.sunday: Timed mock contest (3 problems, 90 min), review solutions, build personal template library, plan next steps

next_steps: Target: Solve ABC-A and ABC-B consistently within 10 minutes
Join Beginner Contests every Saturday 21:00 JST
